ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of asset (e.g., 3D Models, Textures, HDRI) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category of asset (e.g., Installations, Buildings) */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory of asset (e.g., Destroyed, Lamps) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the asset (e.g., cyber, neon, pixel) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the asset */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class of the asset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the asset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the asset was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the asset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the asset (e.g., active, archived, draft) */,
  "thumbnail_path" TEXT /* Path to the thumbnail image of the asset */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the asset */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the asset */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the asset file in bytes */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the asset (if applicable, e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the type was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of asset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category of asset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the subcategory was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the subcategory was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_tags" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, uploader, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the asset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the upload (e.g., reason for upload) */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the uploaded file in bytes */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the uploaded file (if applicable, e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the asset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the version was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the file in this version */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the file in this version (if applicable, e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the asset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the asset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the asset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)
